title: helianthemum thymifolium var. violaceum
intro: Helianthemum thymifolium var. violaceum, also known as Purple Rockrose, is a flowering plant species within the Helianthemum genus. It is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing stress, anxiety, and inflammation, as well as supporting immune function and skin health. Purple Rockrose can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
